content_body:
Das Kaffee Haus opened in September 2016 and offers the right setting for such a Coffee Shop. 

The idea was, and is, to bring back the feel of a European Coffee and Tea House, where older and younger folks like to meet, stay, and communicate without much technology. Of course, there is free WIFI, just in case. You will see that when you escape the hustle and bustle of your daily life somewhere else, Blue Ridge and its energy will make you want to visit it annually.

Sipping on a good Cappuccino while enjoying a wonderful dessert brings back great memories or creates new ones. Good coffee can only be made if you share with us what you love. Some like it creamy and sweet; some like it dark and bold.
title: Das Kaffee Haus
